faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Franklin Square range from $350 to $550 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of drains affected, and size of your property. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat drain flies in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Franklin Square residents. Most drain fly treatments are completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours, with follow-up visits scheduled if needed for severe infestations.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that builds up in drains, pipes, and sewage systems. Franklin Square's older plumbing infrastructure and humid Long Island climate create ideal conditions for drain fly breeding, especially in kitchen and bathroom drains, basement floor drains, and commercial grease traps.

faqs.question: Are your drain fly treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for families and pets. Our technicians focus on mechanical cleaning and bio-enzymatic treatments that eliminate organic buildup where drain flies breed, minimizing chemical use while maximizing effectiveness.
